Package org.attoparser.dom

Class Document

Object
org.attoparser.dom.Document
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, INestableNode, INode
public class Document extends Object implements Serializable

Root object for a DOM object tree produced by the DOMBuilderMarkupHandler handler or the IDOMMarkupParser parser implementations.

Since:
2.0.0
Author:
Daniel Fernández
See Also:
